overall.description: Nighttime driving on a snow-covered highway in a racing simulator. The view is from the driver's seat showing the illuminated dashboard and steering wheel. Snow falls steadily as the vehicle passes under overhead gantries and alongside concrete barriers, with city lights visible in the distance.

events.description: passes under overhead highway gantry with green directional signs
white sedan overtakes on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the snowy highway, maintaining center lane position

notable_agents.action: white sedan overtaking on the right side at high speed

entered.detail: concrete safety barrier running along the left side of the highway
car dashboard with illuminated red gauges and GPS navigation screen
overhead street lights illuminating the snowy road ahead
snow-covered asphalt highway surface with tire tracks
highway overhead gantry with green directional signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with steady driving on a snow-covered highway at night. The interior dashboard is illuminated with red gauges while snow falls outside. The vehicle passes under an overhead sign gantry and is overtaken by a white sedan on the right.

events.description: passes under second overhead gantry structure
vehicle with bright headlights passes on the right

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed on the highway, occasionally glancing at passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: vehicle with bright headlights overtaking on the right

entered.detail: distant city lights visible on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the snowy highway, the vehicle passes under a second overhead gantry while distant city lights become visible on the left. Other vehicles occasionally pass on the right side of the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with tall communication tower landmark

events.description: tall illuminated communication tower comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving along the curved highway approaching the distinctive tower structure

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall replacing the lower safety barrier
tall illuminated lattice tower with red aviation lights

segments.scene_description: The left side barrier transitions to a taller concrete retaining wall as the highway curves. A prominent illuminated communication tower appears on the right horizon and grows larger as the vehicle approaches. City lights continue to glow in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with commercial billboards and exit signage

events.description: large illuminated advertising billboards appear on the right side
approaching overhead exit signs indicating junction ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the highway past the tower and approaching exit signage

entered.detail: large illuminated commercial billboard on the right side of highway
overhead gantry with exit direction signs

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the communication tower and continues toward highway exit signage. Large illuminated commercial billboards appear on the right side, and the road approaches an overhead gantry with directional signs for the upcoming junction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a snow-covered highway at night, transitioning from a stretch of open road into a densely lit commercial corridor. It begins with the vehicle moving past an overhead gantry under falling snow, the red glow of the dashboard illuminating the interior as a white sedan overtakes on the right. As the journey continues, the camera passes under a second gantry while distant city lights emerge on the left and other vehicles flicker past in the adjacent lanes. The scene then shifts as the left barrier becomes a tall concrete retaining wall and the highway curves, bringing a prominent illuminated communication tower into sharp focus on the right horizon. Finally, the vehicle passes the tower and approaches a series of large commercial billboards and directional exit signage under a final overhead gantry.
